# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Returns a new decoration identifier matching the provided String.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ rawValue: String)
```

## Creating Decoration Identifiers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Returns a new decoration identifier matching the provided value.

items.description: Returns a new decoration identifier matching the provided value.
items.name: init(rawValue:)
